6756789866.name: Escalator Field Command
6756789866.description:
Built for Escalator Mechanics. Everything You Need in the Field.

Escalator Field Command is the professional-grade tool for escalator mechanics who want to work faster, stay organized, and ensure compliance with 100% on-device data and no sign-up required.

YOUR ROUTE. YOUR RECORDS. YOUR WAY.
Add every escalator on your maintenance route with detailed unit information, service history, and key notes. Instantly accessible, always offline. No more flipping through notes or searching multiple systems.

CAT1 TESTING, SIMPLIFIED.
Category 1 testing is broken into four colour-coded sections for at-a-glance progress tracking. Always know what’s complete and what’s outstanding. Share results directly from the app.

ALL YOUR DOCUMENTS, ALWAYS OFFLINE.
Upload manuals, test reports, photos, and any supporting documents so everything related to the job lives in one place, organized, searchable, and available without an internet connection.

LOG HOURS & TRACK TIME.
Log time tickets for maintenance, repairs, travel, and training. Weekly timesheets auto-fill from your records. Export-ready for your company’s payroll system.

FLAG ISSUES BEFORE THEY ESCALATE.
Mark units as urgent or non-urgent. Track open items across your entire route. Never lose a follow-up.

ONBOARD NEW MECHANICS INSTANTLY.
Incoming mechanics gain immediate access to historical test data and unit notes. Institutional knowledge is preserved. Transition time is minimized.

THE FIELD GUIDE — CODE REFERENCE, BUILT IN.
Pro unlocks a searchable field guide to escalator and moving walk requirements, drawn from ASME A17.1/CSA B44 and MCP. Ask a question in plain language and get a clear, sourced answer in seconds, jump to any section by code number, and bookmark the rules you rely on most — all without leaving the app.

The result: 
faster onboarding, fewer delays, improved testing accuracy, stronger compliance confidence, and measurable labor and efficiency savings.

PRIVACY FIRST. ALWAYS.
All data lives on your device. No cloud account. No internet required. No sign-up. Automatic daily backups keep everything safe.

—

PRO SUBSCRIPTION
The app is free to download and includes a 30-day free trial of Pro — no credit card required. A Pro subscription unlocks unlimited escalators and all features.

Payment is charged to your Apple ID account at confirmation of purchase. Subscriptions automatically renew unless auto-renew is turned off at least 24 hours before the end of the current period.

6758072258.name: HealthTrail Medical
6758072258.description:
HealthTrail Medical: 
The future of patient-centric medical management

Have you ever sat in a doctor’s office and blanked on the date of your last tetanus shot? Or struggled to remember the exact name of the medication your aging parent was prescribed last year?

HealthTrail is the digital "medical memory" for your entire family. It eliminates the guesswork from healthcare by providing an instant, visual timeline of every medical event, medication, and milestone. Whether you are managing your own health, keeping track of your children's development, or acting as a caregiver for elderly parents, HealthTrail ensures that the right information is always in your pocket.

Why Use HealthTrail?
Medical history is often scattered across different clinics, portals, and paper files. HealthTrail centralizes it all so you can:

* Be Prepared for Appointments: Instantly answer questions like "When was your last colonoscopy?" or "What was the result of that blood test?"
* Coordinate Care: Seamlessly manage multiple family members’ profiles in one place.
* Keep Perfect Records: Attach photos of lab results, pill bottles, or discharge papers directly to specific events.

CORE FEATURES

Visual Health Timeline
* A beautiful, chronological view of your complete medical history.
* Track doctor visits, specialist appointments, surgeries, and screenings (like Pap smears or colonoscopies). 

Smart Medication Management
* AI Scan: Snap a photo of a pill bottle, and the AI automatically extracts the details.
* History: Keep a record of both active and past prescriptions, including dosages and refill dates.

Comprehensive Vaccine Tracking
Never lose track of your immunization records again.
* Complete History: Log every vaccination from childhood boosters to annual flu shots and travel vaccines.
* Instant Access: When schools, workplaces, or travel authorities ask for proof of vaccination, you have the dates and photos of your records ready to go.

Family Profiles
* Create separate profiles for children, spouses, or elderly parents.
* Switch between profiles with a single tap—perfect for caregivers. 

Insurance & Documentation
* Insurance Cards: Upload a photo for automatic data extraction. Never fumble at the pharmacy again.
* Work-Related Tracking: Flag injuries or appointments for insurance claims and workplace documentation.
100% Private & Secure
* Your data stays with you. All information is stored locally on your device. We do not upload your sensitive health data to the cloud or share it with third parties.

6759497982.name: SnapLedger
6759497982.description:
Ditch the spreadsheet.

Take control of your finances - one snap at a time.

SnapLedger makes managing your household bills and subscriptions effortless. Simply snap a photo of any bill and let Al instantly extract all the details.
No more manual entry, no more surprises.

SMART BILL SCANNING
Point your camera at any bill and SnapLedger does the rest. Our Al reads the amount, date, and category automatically - saving you time every month.

SUBSCRIPTION TRACKING
See exactly what you're paying for every month and year. SnapLedger groups your subscriptions by category so you always know where your money is going.

HOUSEHOLD EXPENSE OVERVIEW
Track electricity, gas, internet, phone, and more in one clean dashboard. Spot trends, compare months, and stay ahead of your expenses.

BUILT FOR REAL LIFE
- ﻿﻿Scan or manually enter any bill in seconds
- ﻿﻿View full payment history for every category
- ﻿﻿Track both monthly and annual subscriptions

6758283387.name: Gold Watcher
6758283387.description:
Track gold prices in real time. Gold Watcher is the essential app for investors, jewelers, and precious metals enthusiasts who want serious tools without a serious learning curve.

HOME SCREEN WIDGET — Add a small or medium widget to see the live gold spot price, today's change, and a 7-day chart right on your home screen, in your selected currency. It refreshes through the day without opening the app.

LIVE GOLD PRICE — Spot gold updated throughout the trading day. Today's Pulse headline gives you a one-sentence read on what's actually moving — new highs, big moves, streaks, or moving-average crosses — generated from live data. Daily range, historical charts (1D through 10Y and MAX), and a live heartbeat indicator. Switch between line and dot chart styles. Rotate your device for immersive fullscreen charts.

PORTFOLIO TRACKER — Track every gold purchase with live P&L. When you sell, record the sale price and date — Gold Watcher logs the realized gain and shows your cumulative profit across closed positions. Manage holdings in oz, g, kg, dwt, tola, tael, or grain. Karat-aware: 14K and 18K pieces are valued correctly against pure gold. Mark gifts separately so they don't inflate the profit number.

WHAT-IF CALCULATOR — See what your investment would be worth today if you'd bought gold at any past date. Compare returns against the S&P 500 and gold ETFs with overlay charts. Toggle between lump-sum and dollar-cost-averaging strategies.

KARAT CALCULATOR — Convert between gold weight and value at the current spot price. All karats from 24K pure (.999 fine) to 9K, with fineness labels for every level.

GOLD ETFs, FUTURES & MINERS — Follow GLD, IAU, and SGOL with live prices and history. Monitor gold futures. Track top gold mining stocks with live quotes.

KEY RATIOS — Gold/Silver ratio with adaptive timeframe (1Y, 5Y, 10Y, MAX) and a dated x-axis. BTC/Gold ratio chart for tracking sentiment between the two hard-money assets. Real Interest Rate indicator (real yield = treasury rate minus inflation expectations) — the single best macro signal for gold.

SIGNALS — Live financial news from Reuters, Bloomberg, Kitco, MarketWatch and more, each with the publisher's logo. Live Polymarket prediction-market odds on the macro forces moving gold — Fed rate cuts, inflation, recession risk, central bank reserves.

SMARTER SENTIMENT — The Bullish / Bearish / Neutral badge blends short-term momentum, 50-day trend health, and news-headline tone — not just today's price change.

SEASONAL PATTERNS — A 10-year average monthly return chart helps you time purchases with data, not guesswork.

PREMIUM — Unlock the Portfolio, What-If, Calculator tabs and premium analytical cards. Monthly, yearly, and one-time Lifetime Access plans available. Current prices and free trial details are shown on the in-app paywall.

10 CURRENCIES — View everything in CAD, USD, EUR, GBP, INR, AUD, CHF, JPY, CNY, or HKD.

Built by Artificial Igknorance.

https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/

6760270695.name: Silver Watcher
6760270695.description:
Track silver prices in real time. Silver Watcher is the essential app for stackers, coin collectors, and precious metals investors.

HOME SCREEN WIDGET — Add a small or medium widget to see the live silver spot price, today's change, and a 7-day chart right on your home screen, in your selected currency. It refreshes through the day without opening the app.

LIVE SILVER PRICE — Spot silver updated throughout the trading day. Historical charts (1D through 10Y and MAX), daily range, and a live heartbeat indicator. Switch between line and dot chart styles. Rotate your device for immersive fullscreen charts.

PORTFOLIO TRACKER — Track every silver purchase with live P&L. When you sell, record the sale price and date — Silver Watcher logs the realized gain and shows your cumulative profit across closed positions. Manage holdings in oz, g, kg, dwt, tola, tael, or grain. Purity-aware: Sterling (.925), Britannia (.958), and Coin Silver (.900) are valued correctly against fine silver. Mark gifts separately so they don't inflate the profit number.

WHAT-IF CALCULATOR — See what your investment would be worth today if you'd bought silver at any past date. Compare returns against the S&P 500 and silver ETFs with overlay charts. Toggle between lump-sum and dollar-cost-averaging strategies with detailed DCA breakdowns.

PURITY CALCULATOR — Calculate the value of silver by weight and purity instantly. Built-in grades from Fine Silver (.999) to European (.800), including Sterling, Britannia, and Coin Silver.

GOLD/SILVER RATIO — Track the gold-to-silver ratio in real time with an adaptive timeframe selector (1Y, 5Y, 10Y, MAX) and a dated x-axis. See the current ratio against its low, average, and high — high values historically mean silver is undervalued. Premium users get a ratio-based buy/sell signal.

SILVER ETFs, FUTURES & MINERS — Follow SLV, SIVR, and PSLV with live prices and detailed history. Monitor silver futures and major silver mining stocks.

SIGNALS — Live financial news from Reuters, Bloomberg, Kitco, MarketWatch and more, each with the publisher's logo. Live Polymarket prediction-market odds on the macro forces moving silver — Fed rate cuts, inflation, recession risk, plus solar and EV demand.

SMARTER SENTIMENT — The Bullish / Bearish / Neutral badge blends short-term momentum, 50-day trend health, and news-headline tone.

SEASONAL PATTERNS — See which months silver historically performs best with a 10-year average monthly return chart.

PREMIUM — Unlock the Portfolio, What-If, and Calculator tabs plus premium analytical cards. Current prices and free trial details are shown on the in-app paywall.

12 CURRENCIES — View everything in CAD, USD, EUR, GBP, INR, AUD, JPY, CHF, CNY, HKD, SGD, or BRL.

6757655923.name: Copper Watcher
6757655923.description:
Track copper prices in real time. Copper Watcher is the essential app for copper investors, scrap dealers, and metal traders.

HOME SCREEN WIDGET — Add a small or medium widget to see the live copper spot price, today's change, and a 7-day chart right on your home screen, in your selected currency. It refreshes through the day without opening the app.

LIVE SPOT PRICE — Get the current copper spot price updated throughout the trading day. View price changes, daily range, and historical charts from 1 day through MAX. Switch between line and dot chart styles. Rotate your device for immersive fullscreen charts.

COPPER ETFs & FUTURES — Follow top copper ETFs including CPER, COPX, and COPP with live prices, daily changes, and detailed price history. Monitor copper futures contracts to stay ahead of market moves.

PICKS & SHOVELS — A premium section of companies that profit from copper demand — heavy equipment makers like Caterpillar, mining service providers, and infrastructure plays. A different angle on copper exposure beyond the metal itself.

WHAT IF CALCULATOR — See what a past copper investment would be worth today. Compare your returns against the S&P 500 and copper ETFs with overlay charts. Toggle between lump sum and dollar-cost averaging strategies.

PORTFOLIO TRACKER — Track every copper purchase with live P&L. When you sell, record the sale price and date — Copper Watcher logs the realized gain and shows your cumulative profit across closed positions. Manage holdings in oz, g, kg, lb, or tonne. Mark gifts separately so they don't inflate the profit number.

SCRAP CALCULATOR — Calculate the value of copper by weight and purity instantly. Built-in grades from OFHC lab grade (100%) to #2 copper scrap (95%), with labels for every commercial purity level.

SIGNALS — Live financial news from Reuters, Bloomberg, MarketWatch, Mining.com and more, each with the publisher's logo. Live Polymarket prediction-market odds on the macro forces moving copper — Fed rate cuts, inflation, China growth, EV demand.

SMARTER SENTIMENT — The Bullish / Bearish / Neutral badge blends short-term momentum, 50-day trend health, and news-headline tone.

SEASONAL PATTERNS — A 10-year average monthly return chart shows which months copper has historically been strongest.

PRICE ALERTS — Set custom alerts for copper price targets. Get notified when copper hits your buy or sell price.

PREMIUM — Unlock the Portfolio, What-If, and Calculator tabs plus the Picks & Shovels section. Current prices and free trial details are shown on the in-app paywall.

10 CURRENCIES — View everything in CAD, USD, EUR, GBP, INR, AUD, CHF, JPY, CNY, or HKD. Your choice applies across the entire app.

LANDSCAPE CHARTS — Rotate your device to view any chart in immersive fullscreen.

6761344726.name: Lithium Watcher
6761344726.description:
Track lithium prices and the EV market in real time. Lithium Watcher is the essential app for lithium investors and EV-market enthusiasts.

HOME SCREEN WIDGET — Add a small or medium widget to see the live LIT ETF price, today's change, and a 7-day chart right on your home screen, in your selected currency. It refreshes through the day without opening the app.

LIVE LITHIUM PRICE — Lithium Hydroxide CME futures, the GSCI Lithium Index, and the LIT ETF — all updated throughout the trading day. Historical charts with multiple timeframes (1D through 10Y and MAX). Switch between line and dot chart styles. Rotate your device for immersive fullscreen charts.

PORTFOLIO TRACKER — Track your lithium and battery-tech investments including LIT, ALB, SQM, PLL, and LAC shares. When you sell, record the sale price and date — Lithium Watcher logs the realized gain and shows your cumulative profit across closed positions. Mark gifts separately so they don't inflate the profit number.

EV MARKET — Track major EV manufacturers — Tesla, Rivian, Lucid, NIO, XPeng, Li Auto, BYD — on a single compare chart. Each ticker gets its own fixed color. Stay on top of the electric-vehicle revolution driving lithium demand.

MINING STOCKS & ETFs — Follow lithium mining stocks (ALB, SQM, PLL, LAC) alongside the Global X Lithium & Battery Tech ETF (LIT) and the KraneShares Electric Vehicles & Future Mobility ETF (KARS).

PICKS & SHOVELS — A premium section of companies that profit from lithium demand — heavy equipment makers like Caterpillar, mining service providers, and infrastructure plays. A different angle on lithium exposure beyond the miners themselves.

SIGNALS — Live financial news from Reuters, Bloomberg, Mining.com and more, each with the publisher's logo. Live Polymarket prediction-market odds on the forces driving lithium demand — Tesla quarterly numbers, Rivian deliveries, EV sales targets, battery supply chains.

SMARTER SENTIMENT — The Bullish / Bearish / Neutral badge blends short-term momentum, 50-day trend health, and news-headline tone.

SEASONAL PATTERNS — Average monthly lithium returns over the past 10 years — see which months have historically been strongest and weakest.

PREMIUM — Unlock the Portfolio, EV Market, and Picks & Shovels with a Lithium Watcher subscription. Current prices and free trial details are shown on the in-app paywall.

MULTI-CURRENCY SUPPORT — View prices in USD, CAD, EUR, GBP, AUD, JPY, CHF, CNY, INR, and more.

6766699306.name: RidgePacker
6766699306.description:
RidgePacker — Gear Organizer & Packing List

Stop showing up to the trailhead with the wrong gear — or worse, forgetting it entirely. RidgePacker is the gear management app built for hikers, backpackers, and everyday carry enthusiasts who care about what they bring and how much it weighs.

YOUR GEAR CATALOG
Build a permanent catalog of everything you own. Add photos, weights, brand details, category tags, and product links. The AI scanner identifies your gear from a photo and fills in the specs automatically.

TRIP PLANNING
Create a trip, pull gear from your catalog, and pack against your list. Set a target weight for any pack or sublist and see how far under or over you are as you add gear. Need more than one of something? Set a quantity and your totals add it up. Prefer it simple? Turn off the check-off circles in Settings and let the list itself be your pack. Every trip shows its item count and total weight in real time, so you know your load before you go.

BASE WEIGHT & CONSUMABLES
Flag food, water, and fuel as consumables and RidgePacker splits your load into base weight, consumables, and worn weight. See your true base weight — the carried, non-consumed number that matters most when you're trying to pack lighter.

NOTES
Tap the note row at the top of any pack or sublist to jot reminders — campsite details, gear swaps, anything you don't want to forget.

SUBLISTS & MODULAR POUCHES
Organize a big trip the way you actually pack it. Break any pack into sublists — a day pack, what's left behind, what the porters carry — then group gear inside them into modular pouches like a first-aid kit or a cook set, up to three levels deep. Move a pouch into another sublist, to your pack's top level, or onto your body — it stays a pouch wherever it lands. Each pack, sublist, and pouch tracks its own weight, rolls up automatically, and can carry its own weight goal.

JUST FOR THIS TRIP
Add one-off items — extra socks, snacks, toiletries — that belong to this trip only. Full photo and weight tracking, without cluttering your permanent gear catalog.

ON YOUR BODY
Separate your worn gear from your packed gear. Mark hiking boots, a trail hat, or a buff as "On Your Body." Body weight is tracked independently and you choose whether it counts toward your pack weight. On a multi-pack trip, set which pack you're carrying — the whole trip or one sublist — and pack weight reflects exactly what's on your back.

EVERYDAY CARRY
Maintain a separate gear list for what you carry every day. Independent from your trip lists, always one tap away.

IMPORT YOUR GEAR
Already track your kit in LighterPack or a spreadsheet? Import your gear list from a CSV file and bring everything into RidgePacker in a single step — units, categories, and consumables included.

SHARE & EXPORT
Turn any trip into a beautifully formatted PDF packing list — with photos, weights, and category charts, and every sublist and modular pouch. Choose exactly what to include, then print it or share it with a hiking partner.

PRIVACY FIRST
No account required. No ads. No cross-app tracking. Your gear catalog and packing lists are stored on your iPhone, not in the cloud — back them up yourself, whenever you want.

TRY IT FREE
Start with 14 days of full access, completely free — every feature, no account, no commitment. After that, your gear and lists are always there to browse and pack against; a RidgePacker Pro subscription keeps you adding, editing, AI-scanning, and organizing without limits.

RIDGEPACKER PRO
• Monthly and yearly subscriptions available
• Payment is charged to your Apple ID at confirmation of purchase
• Subscription renews automatically unless cancelled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period
• Manage or cancel anytime in your Apple ID Account Settings
